visual_description: A man in a dark suit with an earpiece stands in a dim control room while other staff work at computer monitors. Another man in a light shirt leans over a desk to look at a screen displaying data, and a seated colleague watches the monitor. An older man in a beige suit sits at a desk speaking on a telephone, and a man in a white shirt stands in the doorway observing the scene.
audio_description: A man speaks into a telephone while low-level ambient sounds are audible.
